object_a.label: picture frame
object_a.description: framed artwork/photos along the staircase wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: Several framed photographs or art pieces hung in a vertical sequence on the wall beside the staircase. Frames are dark or black and contrast with the beige wall; decorative arrangement follows the stair angle.
